title: Confidential Project Alpha Research
text: Project Alpha explores a novel algorithm for data partitioning. The core technique uses a differential privacy layer. The preliminary results show a 20% improvement in throughput. This document contains confidential design choices and parameters.

title: Alpha Literature Review
text: We surveyed related work on partitioning and privacy. Key references include scalable clustering approaches. The team suggests further experiments on latency.

title: Intern Notes on Beta
text: Beta project focuses on UI improvements. Intern observations list user complaints and suggested fixes.

title: External Paper: Scalable Partitioning
text: This paper presents a scalable partitioning algorithm with experimental results. It is widely cited and provides useful baselines for throughput.
